examples.detection_note: No executable code blocks detected (1935 data-only blocks found). Site may use non-standard code rendering that the auditor does not recognize, or all examples are in data formats (YAML/JSON).

top_findings: Link verification inconclusive for 4 URLs (auth/rate-limit/server block); these are excluded from broken-link counts.
Example reliability: 0% on 1059 pages (likely detection limitation). Site may use JS-rendered code blocks.
Documentation is split across multiple sites for one product; this is likely a discoverability/consistency risk.

analysis.executive_summary: Audit covered 1,059 pages across 2 documentation sites (developer.gitbook.com, gitbook.com/docs) representing a single product. Crawl achieved 100% coverage with 95% confidence. Critical issues include 36 confirmed broken internal links (all user-facing documentation links, zero repository links), 33.47% SEO/geo issue rate, and 0% example reliability detection across all pages. API reference coverage is 75% (220 API pages detected). Last-updated metadata present on 81.97% of pages.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage at 100% of discovered pages with high crawl confidence (95%)
API reference documentation detected and measured at 75% coverage across 220 pages
Last-updated metadata present on 82% of pages, supporting freshness transparency
Overall audit confidence at 87.5% indicates reliable findings
No repository navigation link breakage; all 36 broken links are documentation-only
risks: 36 confirmed broken internal documentation links degrade user navigation and trust
33.47% SEO/geo issue rate threatens discoverability and search ranking
Documentation split across 2 domains (developer.gitbook.com and gitbook.com/docs) creates fragmentation and consistency risk
0% example reliability detection across 1,059 pages suggests JS-rendered code blocks may not be auditable; actual example quality unknown
4 links unverified due to authentication/rate-limiting; may hide additional broken links
25% of API reference documentation missing or undetected
18% of pages lack last-updated metadata, obscuring content freshness for users

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 36 confirmed broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Consolidate documentation from 2 domains into single authoritative site or implement clear cross-linking strategy
Remediate SEO/geo issues affecting 33.47% of pages (meta descriptions, titles, structured data)
Investigate and resolve example detection failure; validate code examples render correctly and add static fallbacks if JS-dependent
Complete API reference documentation to achieve 100% coverage (currently 75%, 220 pages)

limitations: Example reliability at 0% likely indicates detection limitation with JS-rendered code blocks; external audit cannot verify actual example quality or executability
4 unverified links due to authentication/rate-limiting may conceal additional broken links not captured in this audit
Audit cannot assess content accuracy, technical correctness, or whether documentation matches actual product behavior
Multi-site topology may have undiscovered cross-domain links or version conflicts not visible to crawler
API coverage detection at 85% confidence means some API pages may be misclassified or undetected
